Hero.title: VOVÓ MARIA'S GUESTHOUSE
Hero.subtitle: Tradition, comfort, and the care that only Vovó Maria offers.

About.subtitle: Our Story
About.title: Hospitality with Soul
About.p1: Pousada da Vovó Maria was born from the dream of offering much more than just lodging. Here, every guest is treated like part of the family — with care, respect, and all the dedication you deserve.
About.p2: Located in a quiet and welcoming environment, our guesthouse combines rustic charm with all modern comforts.

items.breakfast_desc: Fresh bread, cake, seasonal fruits, and lots of love prepared every morning.
items.comfort_desc: Soft linens, always fragrant rooms, and details that make a difference.
items.service_desc: Flexible check-in and individual attention for every guest, just like at home.
items.tranquility_desc: Calm location, well-kept garden, and spaces to relax with peace and quiet.
items.gift_desc: Every guest receives a special treat from Vovó Maria upon arrival.
items.location_desc: Easy access to the beaches and tourist spots of Cabo Frio.
items.pool_desc: For sunny days, a clean and inviting pool is always waiting for you.
items.bbq_desc: Full gourmet area to socialize with your family in unforgettable moments.

review1.text: “My family and I loved it! From the first moment, we felt at home. The breakfast is wonderful and Grandma Maria is a sweetheart. We've already planned to return next holiday!” 😊
review1.author: Sarah & Family

review2.text: "The best value for money I've found. Clean, fragrant room, hearty breakfast, and impeccable service. I recommend it with eyes closed for the whole family."
review2.author: Ricardo M.

review3.text: "We traveled as a family and it was perfect! The kids loved it, the adults really rested. Grandma Maria has a special way of making everyone feel welcome."
review3.author: Manoella & Family

Booking.successMsg: We received your request. We will contact you via WhatsApp soon.

Footer.description: Feel at home! Our space was created to offer unforgettable moments, with a barbecue area, refreshing pool, and several spots for you to relax.
